name: ISO/IEC 27001
description: Paraphrased ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A self-assessment checklist for MVP use. This is not the official standard text.

sections.title: Organizational controls
sections.description: Governance, policies, supplier management, incident management, compliance and operational security management.

requirements.question: Does the company maintain approved information security policies?
requirements.description: Check whether security policies are documented, approved, communicated and reviewed.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Does the company maintain approved information security policies?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for ISO27001.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A 5.1.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are information security roles and responsibilities clearly assigned?
requirements.description: Verify that ownership for security activities is defined across relevant teams.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are information security roles and responsibilities clearly assigned?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for ISO27001.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A 5.2.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are conflicting duties separated where relevant?

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A 5.3.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A 5.7.

sections.title: People controls
sections.description: Controls related to employees, contractors, awareness, confidentiality and remote work.

requirements.question: Are assets protected when used outside company premises?

sections.title: Technological controls
sections.description: Controls for endpoint security, access, networks, logging, monitoring, cryptography and secure development.
